nodes.summary: CLI entrypoint. Runs the update preflight, then dispatches one flag to the matching lib module; falls through to runInit.
public_contracts: forgeai-init CLI flags documented in usage()

nodes.summary: Process-wide constants: repo root (cwd), template/profile paths, parsed argv flags. Imported by nearly every lib module; utils.ts adds shared fs/spawn helpers.

Init/upgrade engine: copies templates/ and profiles/ into the target repo, writes .ai/manifest.json, and enforces PRESERVE_ON_UPGRADE_FILES so upgrades never clobber user-populated context, run state, tuned routing, or the security policy.

All --check-* gates: harness completeness (file list derived from templates/), git workflow, session overlap, lifecycle journals, CodeGraph validity, review gate, and the supply-chain security scan with policy-driven exceptions.

--add-model/--list-models/--remove-model: edits .ai/cli-adapters.json and repoints tiers in .ai/model-routing.yaml with line-level edits that must stay parseable by the router's hand-rolled readTier().

The installable harness: .ai/ markdown (rules, workflows, skills, state), security policy, CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md, .claude skills, openspec scaffold, and the delegation router. The recursive file list doubles as the required-file manifest for --check.
public_contracts: every file here becomes a required harness file in user repos

nodes.summary: Delegation runtime shipped into user repos: resolves tier from model-routing.yaml, healthchecks the provider CLI from cli-adapters.json, runs it with the assignment, and emits a JSON fallback payload when delegation cannot run.
Optional per-stack overlays (nextjs, node-api, tauri, monorepo, python-api, mobile) copied on top of the base harness when --profile is used or auto-detected.

This repo's own installed harness (dogfood copy at package_version in .ai/manifest.json). MEMORY.md carries the long-term roadmap and is preserved on upgrade; keep it in sync with templates/ via forgeai-init --upgrade.
node:test e2e suite: runs the CLI via tsx in temp dirs per feature area (init/upgrade preservation, each checker, router fallback, profiles). npm test also runs tsc as the typecheck gate.

edges.summary: Dispatches every --check-* flag to a checker module.
Default command and --upgrade run the init engine.
copyRecursive installs the template tree into the target repo; preserve rules decide what survives --upgrade.
Applies the selected/auto-detected profile overlay after the base copy.
runCheck derives the required-file list from templates/, so adding a template file changes what --check demands in every user repo.
repointTierInYaml/adapter writes must stay compatible with the router's hand-rolled readTier() and adapter schema.
Installed by forgeai-init --upgrade; drift between the two makes --check fail in this repo.
Every suite shells out to bin/forgeai-init.ts in a temp repo.
router.test.ts exercises tier resolution, healthcheck failure, and the fallback payload.
